description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily white with dark gray roofing and accents, and it features large windows that allow for ample natural light. The front of the house includes a covered porch with columns, a driveway leading to a carport, and a small manicured lawn. Surrounding the house are several ornamental trees, including both green and purple-leaved varieties, adding a landscaped, suburban feel. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and additional landscaping. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a covered porch, and landscaped surroundings featuring ornamental trees and a patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, driveway with car, manicured lawn, and several ornamental trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, upper story windows, and a large green tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio area with outdoor seating and more ornamental trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, additional windows, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a modern single front door
